subject: Continuing frame processing after stopping
body:
Hi all,

If I stop frame processing with WarpTools and then continue it, should it 
continue from where it left off when restarting it?

I'm processing a large dataset which was interrupted at ~80% of the way 
through. After repeating fs_motion_and_ctf, it detects the previously 
processed metadata, but still seems to re-process them anyway. 

Is this the expected behaviour, and is there a way to stop it reprocessing 
the processed frames? This is with WarpTools v2.0.0dev31.

Thanks!
Josh
